# structured corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === dotenv ===
# expect: Dotenv Secret Line
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# === npmrc ===
# expect: npmrc Auth Token
//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=npmTokenPlaceholderaaaaaaaa

# === pypirc ===
# expect: pypirc Password
password = pypiPasswordPlaceholder

# === git-credentials ===
# expect: Git Credentials URL
https://gituser:gitPasswordPlaceholder@github.com

# === netrc ===
# expect: Netrc Credentials
machine api.example.com login deployuser password netrcSecretPlaceholder

# === docker config ===
# expect: Docker Config Auth
"auth": "ZGVwbG95dXNlcjpkZXBsb3lwYXNz"

# === sidekiq url ===
# expect: Sidekiq Sensitive URL
https://user:sidekiqPwdPlaceholder@gems.contribsys.com

# === bundler enterprise ===
# expect: Bundler Enterprise Creds
BUNDLE_ENTERPRISE__CONTRIBSYS__COM=user:bundlerPwdPlaceholder

# === nuget ===
# expect: NuGet ClearText Password
<add key="ClearTextPassword" value="nugetCleartextPlaceholder" />

# === oauth2 access_token ===
# expect: OAuth2 access_token Param
https://app.example.com/cb#access_token=accessTokenPlaceholderaaaaaaaa

# === oauth2 id_token ===
# expect: OAuth2 id_token Param
https://app.example.com/cb#id_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6abc

# === oauth2 code ===
# expect: OAuth2 code Param
https://app.example.com/cb?code=authorizationCodePlaceholderaaaa

# === Password-manager exports + credential files (Block 4a) ===
# expect: Password Manager Export Header
# expect: 1Password 1PIF Concealed Field
# expect: PostgreSQL .pgpass Line
# expect: AWS Secret Access Key (labeled)
# expect: kubeconfig client-key-data
name,url,username,password
{"k":"concealed","v":"hunter2P@ss"}
db.example.com:5432:mydb:appuser:S3cretPassw0rd
aws_secret_access_key = wJalrXUtnFEMIaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
client-key-data: LS0tLS1CRUdJTiBQUklWQVRFIEtFWS0tLS0tabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789
